title: Verification block retired; proof lives on the task criterion
description: The verification block kind and the verification_verifies_item relation are removed. A task success_criterion carries its own proof inline (verified_by, verified_at, evidence). Existing verification items fold into the criteria they attest, or are dropped.

evidence.reference: block_kinds registry includes 'verification'; relation_types registry includes 'verification_verifies_item'
holds verification items that duplicate the pass/proof a criterion now carries

impact: Two constructs assert the same done-ness: the criterion's pass and a separate verification item.
proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
